name: ♡₊˚ ・₊✧ || SUNGHOON
description:
“It’s not hard to see, the boy is mine.”

-The Boy Is Mine, Brandy & Monica

Normally, guys and girls never really say it but looks really do matter in the people they like. You tried to ignore it but it was hard cause Sunghoon really was too attractive to ignore. Now he’s your boyfriend and it’s biting you in the ass because others seem to forget that he isn’t single anymore. Lisa, his friend whom you think is too close to him, seemed to think that he was hers even though he never was. The boy is yours.
